en: After this the Lord appointed seventy-two others and sent them on ahead of him, two by two, into every town and place where he himself was about to go.
zh: 這些事以後，主又另外指派了七十二個人 ，差遣他們兩個兩個地，在他前面，到他自己將要到的各城各地去。

en: And he said to them, "The harvest is plentiful, but the laborers are few. Therefore pray earnestly to the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into his harvest.
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“莊稼多，工人少，所以你們應當求莊稼的主，派工人出去收他的莊稼。

en: Go your way; behold, I am sending you out as lambs in the midst of wolves.
zh: 你們去吧！我差你們去，如同羊羔進入狼群。

en: Carry no moneybag, no knapsack, no sandals, and greet no one on the road.
zh: 不要帶錢囊，不要帶口袋，不要帶鞋，不要在路上問候人。

en: Whatever house you enter, first say, 'Peace be to this house!'
zh: 無論進哪一家，先說：‘願平安歸與這家！’

en: And if a son of peace is there, your peace will rest upon him. But if not, it will return to you.
zh: 那裡若有配得平安的人 ，你們的平安就必臨到他，不然，就歸給你們。

en: And remain in the same house, eating and drinking what they provide, for the laborer deserves his wages. Do not go from house to house.
zh: 你們要住在那家，吃喝他們所供給的，因為作工的理當得工資；不必從這家搬到那家。

en: Whenever you enter a town and they receive you, eat what is set before you.
zh: 無論進哪一城，人若接待你們，擺上甚麼，就吃甚麼。

en: Heal the sick in it and say to them, 'The kingdom of God has come near to you.'
zh: 要醫治城中的病人，對他們宣講：‘ 神的國臨近你們了。’

en: But whenever you enter a town and they do not receive you, go into its streets and say,
zh: 無論進哪一城，人若不接待你們，你們就出來到街上，說：

en: 'Even the dust of your town that clings to our feet we wipe off against you. Nevertheless know this, that the kingdom of God has come near.'
zh: ‘連你們城裡那黏在我們腳上的塵土，我們也要當著你們擦去。雖然這樣，你們應該知道： 神的國臨近了！’

en: I tell you, it will be more bearable on that day for Sodom than for that town.
zh: 我告訴你們，當那日，所多瑪所受的，比那城所受的還輕呢。

en: "Woe to you, Chorazin! Woe to you, Bethsaida! For if the mighty works done in you had been done in Tyre and Sidon, they would have repented long ago, sitting in sackcloth and ashes.
zh: “哥拉遜啊，你有禍了！伯賽大啊，你有禍了！因為在你們那裡行過的神蹟，如果行在推羅和西頓，他們早已披麻蒙灰，坐在地上悔改了。

en: But it will be more bearable in the judgment for Tyre and Sidon than for you.
zh: 在審判的時候，推羅和西頓所受的，比你們所受的還輕呢。

en: And you, Capernaum, will you be exalted to heaven? You shall be brought down to Hades.
zh: 還有你，迦百農啊！ 你會被高舉到天上嗎？ 你必降到陰間。

en: "The one who hears you hears me, and the one who rejects you rejects me, and the one who rejects me rejects him who sent me."
zh: 聽從你們的，就是聽從我；棄絕你們的，就是棄絕我；棄絕我的，就是棄絕那差我來的。”

en: The seventy-two returned with joy, saying, "Lord, even the demons are subject to us in your name!"
zh: 那七十二個人歡歡喜喜地回來，說：“主啊，因你的名，連鬼也服了我們。”

en: And he said to them, "I saw Satan fall like lightning from heaven.
zh: 耶穌說：“我看見撒但，像閃電一樣從天墜落。

en: Behold, I have given you authority to tread on serpents and scorpions, and over all the power of the enemy, and nothing shall hurt you.
zh: 我已經給你們權柄，去踐踏蛇和蠍子，勝過仇敵的一切能力。絕對沒有甚麼能傷害你們了。

en: Nevertheless, do not rejoice in this, that the spirits are subject to you, but rejoice that your names are written in heaven."
zh: 然而不要因為鬼服了你們就歡喜，卻要因為你們的名字記錄在天上而歡喜。”

en: In that same hour he rejoiced in the Holy Spirit and said, "I thank you, Father, Lord of heaven and earth, that you have hidden these things from the wise and understanding and revealed them to little children; yes, Father, for such was your gracious will.
zh: 就在這時候，耶穌因聖靈而歡樂，說：“父啊，天地的主，我讚美你，因為你把這些事向智慧和聰明的人隱藏起來，卻向嬰孩顯明。父啊，是的，這就是你的美意。

en: All things have been handed over to me by my Father, and no one knows who the Son is except the Father, or who the Father is except the Son and anyone to whom the Son chooses to reveal him."
zh: 我父已經把一切交給我；除了父沒有人知道子是誰，除了子和子所願意啟示的人，也沒有人知道父是誰。”

en: Then turning to the disciples he said privately, "Blessed are the eyes that see what you see!
zh: 耶穌轉過身來，悄悄地對門徒說：“看見你們所看見的，那眼睛有福了！

en: For I tell you that many prophets and kings desired to see what you see, and did not see it, and to hear what you hear, and did not hear it."
zh: 我告訴你們，曾經有許多先知和君王，想看你們所看見的，卻沒有看到；想聽你們所聽見的，卻沒有聽到。”

en: And behold, a lawyer stood up to put him to the test, saying, "Teacher, what shall I do to inherit eternal life?"
zh: 有一個律法師起來試探耶穌，說：“老師，我應該作甚麼，才可以承受永生呢？”

en: He said to him, "What is written in the Law? How do you read it?"
zh: 耶穌對他說：“律法上寫的是甚麼？你怎麼念的呢？”

en: And he answered, "You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your strength and with all your mind, and your neighbor as yourself."
zh: 他回答：“你要全心、全性、全力、全意愛主你的 神，並且要愛鄰舍如同自己。”

en: And he said to him, "You have answered correctly; do this, and you will live."
zh: 耶穌說：“你答得對，你這樣行，就必得生命。”

en: But he, desiring to justify himself, said to Jesus, "And who is my neighbor?"
zh: 那人想證明自己有理，就對耶穌說：“誰是我的鄰舍呢？”

en: Jesus replied, "A man was going down from Jerusalem to Jericho, and he fell among robbers, who stripped him and beat him and departed, leaving him half dead.
zh: 耶穌回答：“有一個人從耶路撒冷下耶利哥去，落在強盜手中。他們剝去他的衣服，把他打得半死，撇下他一個人就走了。

en: Now by chance a priest was going down that road, and when he saw him he passed by on the other side.
zh: 正好有一個祭司，從那條路下來，看見他，就從旁邊走過去了。

en: So likewise a Levite, when he came to the place and saw him, passed by on the other side.
zh: 又有一個利未人，來到那裡，看見他，也照樣從旁邊走過去了。

en: But a Samaritan, as he journeyed, came to where he was, and when he saw him, he had compassion.
zh: 只有一個撒瑪利亞人，旅行來到他那裡，看見了，就動了憐憫的心，

en: He went to him and bound up his wounds, pouring on oil and wine. Then he set him on his own animal and brought him to an inn and took care of him.
zh: 上前用油和酒倒在他的傷處，包裹好了，把他扶上自己的牲口，帶他到客店裡照顧他。

en: And the next day he took out two denarii and gave them to the innkeeper, saying, 'Take care of him, and whatever more you spend, I will repay you when I come back.'
zh: 第二天，他拿出兩個銀幣交給店主，說：‘請你照顧他，額外的開支，我回來的時候必還給你。’

en: Which of these three, do you think, proved to be a neighbor to the man who fell among the robbers?"
zh: 你想，這三個人，誰是那個落在強盜手中的人的鄰舍呢？”

en: He said, "The one who showed him mercy." And Jesus said to him, "You go, and do likewise."
zh: 他說：“是那憐憫他的。”耶穌說：“你去，照樣作吧。”

en: Now as they went on their way, Jesus entered a village. And a woman named Martha welcomed him into her house.
zh: 他們走路的時候，耶穌進了一個村莊。有一個名叫馬大的女人，接他到家裡。

en: And she had a sister called Mary, who sat at the Lord's feet and listened to his teaching.
zh: 她有一個妹妹，名叫馬利亞，坐在主的腳前聽道。

en: But Martha was distracted with much serving. And she went up to him and said, "Lord, do you not care that my sister has left me to serve alone? Tell her then to help me."
zh: 馬大被許多要作的事，弄得心煩意亂，就上前來，說：“主啊，我妹妹讓我一個人侍候，你不理嗎？請吩咐她來幫助我。”

en: But the Lord answered her, "Martha, Martha, you are anxious and troubled about many things,
zh: 主回答她：“馬大，馬大，你為許多事操心忙碌，

en: but one thing is necessary. Mary has chosen the good portion, which will not be taken away from her."
zh: 但是最需要的只有一件，馬利亞已經選擇了那上好的分，是不能從她奪去的。”
